title: SCREENWISE ENROLLING - 211info
text: NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT SCREENWISE ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 419 E 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon - Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 506-2600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 506-2600 Alternate (971) 673-0581 ScreenWise Information Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Sherman and Wasco Counties Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - FOOD HANDLER CARD ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - WATER QUALITY ASSURANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH LICENSED FACILITY INSPECTIONS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT
